info.name: Kemet Public API
info.description:
Professional Postman collection for the **Kemet** heavy machinery public REST API (Laravel 12).

## Base URL
`{{base_url}}` — default: `http://127.0.0.1:8000/api`

## Authentication
No authentication required. All endpoints are public.

## Localization
Supported locales: `en`, `ar`, `fr`, `es`, `ru`

Set locale via:
- Header: `X-Locale: en`
- Query param: `?lang=en`

## Response Envelope
All responses follow this structure:
```json
{
  "code": 200,
  "message": "Human-readable status message",
  "data": {},
  "pagination": {}
}
```

`pagination` is only included on paginated endpoints (FAQ).

## Error Codes
| Code | Description |
|------|-------------|
| 200 | Success |
| 201 | Created (contact, consultation) |
| 404 | Resource not found |
| 422 | Validation error — `data` contains field errors |
| 500 | Server error |

## Setup
1. Import `Kemet-API.postman_collection.json`
2. Import `Kemet-Local.postman_environment.json`
3. Run `php artisan serve` and ensure DB is seeded: `php artisan migrate --seed`
4. Select the **Kemet — Local** environment

Generated: 2026-06-14 02:11:21 UTC

request.description: Returns the About page content (HTML description, banner, image, last updated date).

response.name: 200 OK

originalRequest.description: Returns the About page content (HTML description, banner, image, last updated date).

response.body:
{"code":200,"message":"About retrieved successfully","data":{"banner":"http://127.0.0.1:8000/uploads/images/KEMET Final Logo.jpg","title":"About Kemet & Alpha Sino","description":"

Our Story

About Kemet & Alpha Sino

Building trusted industrial partnerships across the Middle East, Africa, and beyond since 2003.

Company History

A Legacy Built On Industrial Trust

Founded in Dubai's Port Said district, Alpha Sino General Trading Co. LLC began as a specialized importer of construction and mining equipment for the rapidly developing UAE market. Two decades of relationship-driven commerce transformed us into one of the region's most recognized heavy machinery distributors.

The KEMET brand was born from a simple conviction: the GCC construction and mining sectors deserved purpose-engineered machinery that could withstand extreme heat, continuous heavy-cycle operations, and the logistical demands of remote project sites — without compromising operator productivity or machine reliability.

Today, KEMET machines are deployed across construction megaprojects, open-pit mining operations, and industrial infrastructure developments spanning the UAE, Saudi Arabia, Egypt, and sub-Saharan Africa.

Our Operational Strengths

  • 20+ Years of Excellence — Relationship-driven heavy machinery distribution since 2003.
  • 100% OEM Parts Availability — Guaranteed genuine components for maximized machine uptime.
  • 24/7 Engineering Dispatch — Dedicated technical support team active across the entire GCC.

KEMET by Alpha Sino

Alpha Sino General Trading Co. L.L.C. — your trusted partner for premium heavy machinery across construction, mining, and industrial sectors worldwide.

Professional · Powerful · Reliable

Contact

  • Dubai Airport Building, Office 104, Port Said Area, Dubai, UAE
  • +971 58 860 3711 (Mobile)
  • +971 58 860 3711 (WhatsApp)
  • info@dxbalpha.com

Operational Status

  • Dubai HQ Dispatch — Mon - Sat: 9:00 AM - 6:00 PM. Sunday Closed.
  • GCC Service Fleet — 24/7 Emergency Dispatch Active.
","image":"http://127.0.0.1:8000/uploads/images/KEMET Final Logo.png","updated_at":"2026-06-14"}}

request.description:
Submit a general contact/inquiry message.

Required fields: `name`, `email`, `phone`, `subject`, `message`.

body.raw:
{
    "name": "Ahmed Ali",
    "email": "ahmed@example.com",
    "phone": "+971501234567",
    "subject": "Equipment Inquiry",
    "message": "Please send me a quote for excavators."
}

originalRequest.description:
Submit a general contact/inquiry message.

Required fields: `name`, `email`, `phone`, `subject`, `message`.

body.raw:
{
    "name": "Ahmed Ali",
    "email": "ahmed@example.com",
    "phone": "+971501234567",
    "subject": "Equipment Inquiry",
    "message": "Please send me a quote for excavators."
}

request.description:
Submit an equipment consultation request.

Required: `full_name`, `corporate_email`, `phone`, `message`.
Optional: `category_id`, `category_slug`, `equipment_id`, `equipment_slug`.

body.raw:
{
    "full_name": "John Smith",
    "corporate_email": "john@company.com",
    "phone": "+971501234567",
    "message": "Interested in KL-950 wheel loader for a mining project.",
    "equipment_slug": "kl-950-wheel-loader"
}

originalRequest.description:
Submit an equipment consultation request.

Required: `full_name`, `corporate_email`, `phone`, `message`.
Optional: `category_id`, `category_slug`, `equipment_id`, `equipment_slug`.

body.raw:
